- `nums[l...p]` **严格** 递增，

请你从数组 `nums` 的所有三段式子数组中找出和最大的那个，并返回其 **最大** 和。

**输入：**nums = [0,-2,-1,-3,0,2,-1]

**输出：**-4

- `nums[q...r] = nums[3...5] = [-3, 0, 2]` 严格递增 (`-3 < 0 < 2`)。
- 和 = `(-2) + (-1) + (-3) + 0 + 2 = -4`。

**输入:** nums = [1,4,2,7]

**输出:** 14

- `nums[q...r] = nums[2...3] = [2, 7]` 严格递增 (`2 < 7`)。
- 和 = `1 + 4 + 2 + 7 = 14`。

- `4 <= n = nums.length <= 10e5`

def solve(nums)
    n = nums.length
    if n < 4
        return 0
    end

    left_start = Array.new(n) { 0 }
    left_start[0] = 0
    (1..n-1).each do |i|
        if nums[i] > nums[i-1]
            left_start[i] = left_start[i-1]
        else
            left_start[i] = i
        end
    end

    right_end = Array.new(n) { 0 }
    right_end[n-1] = n-1
    (n-2).downto(0) do |i|
        if nums[i] > nums[i+1]
            right_end[i] = right_end[i+1]
        else
            right_end[i] = i
        end
    end

    right_incr_end = Array.new(n) { 0 }
    right_incr_end[n-1] = n-1
    (n-2).downto(0) do |i|
        if nums[i] < nums[i+1]
            right_incr_end[i] = right_incr_end[i+1]
        else
            right_incr_end[i] = i
        end
    end

    prefix_sum = Array.new(n+1, 0)
    (0..n-1).each do |i|
        prefix_sum[i+1] = prefix_sum[i] + nums[i]
    end

    max_sum = -Float::INFINITY

    (0..n-1).each do |p|
        q = right_end[p]
        if q > p
            if right_incr_end[q] > q
                l = left_start[p]
                r = right_incr_end[q]
                current_sum = prefix_sum[r+1] - prefix_sum[l]
                max_sum = current_sum if current_sum > max_sum
            end
        end
    end

    max_sum
end

def solve(nums)
    n = nums.length
    if n < 4
        return 0
    end

    left_start = Array.new(n) { 0 }
    left_start[0] = 0
    (1..n-1).each do |i|
        if nums[i] > nums[i-1]
            left_start[i] = left_start[i-1]
        else
            left_start[i] = i
        end
    end

    right_end = Array.new(n) { 0 }
    right_end[n-1] = n-1
    (n-2).downto(0) do |i|
        if nums[i] > nums[i+1]
            right_end[i] = right_end[i+1]
        else
            right_end[i] = i
        end
    end

    right_incr_end = Array.new(n) { 0 }
    right_incr_end[n-1] = n-1
    (n-2).downto(0) do |i|
        if nums[i] < nums[i+1]
            right_incr_end[i] = right_incr_end[i+1]
        else
            right_incr_end[i] = i
        end
    end

    prefix_sum = Array.new(n+1, 0)
    (0..n-1).each do |i|
        prefix_sum[i+1] = prefix_sum[i] + nums[i]
    end

    max_sum = -Float::INFINITY

    (0..n-1).each do |p|
        q = right_end[p]
        if q > p
            if right_incr_end[q] > q
                l = left_start[p]
                r = right_incr_end[q]
                current_sum = prefix_sum[r+1] - prefix_sum[l]
                max_sum = current_sum if current_sum > max_sum
            end
        end
    end

    max_sum
end

def solve(nums)
    n = nums.length
    if n < 4
        return 0
    end

    left_start = Array.new(n) { 0 }
    left_start[0] = 0
    (1..n-1).each do |i|
        if nums[i] > nums[i-1]
            left_start[i] = left_start[i-1]
        else
            left_start[i] = i
        end
    end

    right_end = Array.new(n) { 0 }
    right_end[n-1] = n-1
    (n-2).downto(0) do |i|
        if nums[i] > nums[i+1]
            right_end[i] = right_end[i+1]
        else
            right_end[i] = i
        end
    end

    right_incr_end = Array.new(n) { 0 }
    right_incr_end[n-1] = n-1
    (n-2).downto(0) do |i|
        if nums[i] < nums[i+1]
            right_incr_end[i] = right_incr_end[i+1]
        else
            right_incr_end[i] = i
        end
    end

    prefix_sum = Array.new(n+1, 0)
    (0..n-1).each do |i|
        prefix_sum[i+1] = prefix_sum[i] + nums[i]
    end

    max_sum = -Float::INFINITY

    (0..n-1).each do |p|
        q = right_end[p]
        if q > p
            if right_incr_end[q] > q
                l = left_start[p]
                r = right_incr_end[q]
                current_sum = prefix_sum[r+1] - prefix_sum[l]
                max_sum = current_sum if current_sum > max_sum
            end
        end
    end

    max_sum
end

    n = nums.length
    if n <4
        return 0 # but problem says at least one exists
    end

    left_start = Array.new(n) {0}
    left_start[0] = 0
    for i in 1..n-1
        if nums[i] > nums[i-1]
            left_start[i] = left_start[i-1]
        else
            left_start[i] = i
        end
    end

    right_end = Array.new(n) {0}
    right_end[n-1] = n-1
    for i in (n-2).downto(0)
        if nums[i] > nums[i+1]
            right_end[i] = right_end[i+1]
        else
            right_end[i] = i
        end
    end

    right_incr_end = Array.new(n) {0}
    right_incr_end[n-1] = n-1
    for i in (n-2).downto(0)
        if nums[i] < nums[i+1]
            right_incr_end[i] = right_incr_end[i+1]
        else
            right_incr_end[i] = i
        end
    end

    prefix_sum = Array.new(n+1, 0)
    for i in 0..n-1
        prefix_sum[i+1] = prefix_sum[i] + nums[i]
    end

    max_sum = -Float::INFINITY

    for p in 0..n-1
        q = right_end[p]

def solve(nums)
    n = nums.length
    if n < 4
        return 0
    end

    left_start = Array.new(n) { 0 }
    left_start[0] = 0
    (1..n-1).each do |i|
        if nums[i] > nums[i-1]
            left_start[i] = left_start[i-1]
        else
            left_start[i] = i
        end
    end

    right_end = Array.new(n) { 0 }
    right_end[n-1] = n-1
    (n-2).downto(0) do |i|
        if nums[i] > nums[i+1]
            right_end[i] = right_end[i+1]
        else
            right_end[i] = i
        end
    end

    right_incr_end = Array.new(n) { 0 }
    right_incr_end[n-1] = n-1
    (n-2).downto(0) do |i|
        if nums[i] < nums[i+1]
            right_incr_end[i] = right_incr_end[i+1]
        else
            right_incr_end[i] = i
        end
    end

    prefix_sum = Array.new(n+1, 0)
    (0..n-1).each do |i|
        prefix_sum[i+1] = prefix_sum[i] + nums[i]
    end

    max_sum = -Float::INFINITY

    (0..n-1).each do |p|
        q = right_end[p]
        if q > p
            if right_incr_end[q] > q
                l = left_start[p]
                r = right_incr_end[q]
                current_sum = prefix_sum[r+1] - prefix_sum[l]
                max_sum = current_sum if current_sum > max_sum
            end
        end
    end

    max_sum
end
